payload.description: Detect incomplete assistant turns that contain replayable reasoning but no visible text, append the incomplete assistant turn back into session history, and immediately continue the run so the model can emit the visible answer. Keep behavior scoped to the active OpenAI path and add regression tests for reasoning-only assistant output.
payload.title: Continue OpenAI turns after reasoning-only assistant output

payload.description: Implement explicit recovery for assistant turns that contain replayable OpenAI reasoning state but no user-visible text, so agent runs continue instead of terminating with empty or partial output. Scope includes active runtime wiring and targeted regression coverage.
payload.title: OpenAI reasoning-only turn recovery

payload.description: Implement explicit recovery for assistant turns that contain replayable OpenAI reasoning state but no user-visible text, so agent runs continue instead of terminating with empty or partial output. Scope includes active runtime wiring and targeted regression coverage.
payload.title: OpenAI reasoning-only turn recovery
